channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wells Fargo: AI is a ‘euphoric’ bubble and investors should ride it until it pops
item.description: "You can't own anything but AI—that's how a bubble forms. We expect limited downside," Ohsung Kwon says.

item.title: President Trump’s Golden Dome will cost $1.2 trillion, the CBO says, five times more than initially expected
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Shaq’s father once gave his White Castle burgers to a homeless vet—and it inspired the NBA legend’s business and philanthropy empire
item.description: Basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal says his father taught him to give people help when they’re in need—and he’s lived by that lesson throughout his th...

item.title: CEOs join Trump in China where AI will take priority over trade deals
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
